zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Moray of Bothwell, Canon of Moray於1195年出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾波維爾時，他的父親William de Moravia of Petty31歲，母親Agnes Olifard26歲。他於1215年與Elizabeth MacDuff在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾波維爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1253年3月在蘇格蘭享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Moray of Bothwell, Canon of Moray于1195年出生在苏格兰藍納可爾波維爾时，他的父亲William de Moravia of Petty31岁，母亲Agnes Olifard26岁。他于1215年与Elizabeth MacDuff在英国苏格兰藍納可爾波維爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1253年3月在苏格兰享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Moray
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Limerick and Cork): variant of   Moore   4.
English (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Mory, a pet form of Amauri (see Amery ).
English: perhaps also a variant of   Moore   1–3.

variants.name: Morrey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Morey  .

variants.name: Moore
meanings: English: from Middle English more ‘moor, marsh, fen’ (Old English mōr), hence a topographic name for someone who lived in such a place, or a habitational name from any of various places called with this word, as for example Moore in Cheshire or More in Shropshire.
English (of Norman origin): ethnic name from Old French more ‘Moor’, either someone from North Africa or, more often, a nickname for someone thought to resemble a Moor. Compare Morrell and Moreau .

English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English personal name More (Old French More, Maur, Latin Maurus), originally denoting either ‘Moor’ or someone with a swarthy complexion (compare Morrell , Morrin , Morris , and sense 2 above). There was a 6th-century Christian saint of this name.

variants.name: Moree
meanings: French (Morée): habitational name from a place so named in Loir-et-Cher.

variants.name: Morie
meanings: Altered form of Moree, itself perhaps an altered form of English or French Morey (compare 2 below) or of Irish Morrow .
English (London): variant of   Morey  . This surname is rare in Britain.
French: unexplained. This surname is rare in France.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Moray of Bothwell, Canon of Moray was born in 1195, in Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Scotland, his father, William de Moravia of Petty, was 31 and his mother, Agnes Olifard, was 26. He married Elizabeth MacDuff in 1215, in Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in March 1253, in Scotland, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Moray of Bothwell, Canon of Moray est né en 1195, à Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Écosse, son père, William de Moravia of Petty, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Agnes Olifard, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth MacDuff en 1215, à Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en mars 1253, à Écosse, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Moray of Bothwell, Canon of Moray 1195 in Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Moravia of Petty 31 und seine Mutter Agnes Olifard 26. Er hat 1215 in Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Elizabeth MacDuff geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb im März 1253 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Moray of Bothwell, Canon of Moray è nato il nel 1195 nel Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Scotland, il suo padre, William de Moravia of Petty, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Olifard, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth MacDuff nel 1215, nel Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel marzo 1253, nel Scotland, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Moray of Bothwell, Canon of Morayが1195年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアボスウエルで生まれた時，父William de Moravia of Pettyは31歳，母Agnes Olifardは26歳であった。1215年にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアボスウエルでElizabeth MacDuffと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1253年3月にスコットランドで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Moray of Bothwell, Canon of Moray(이)가 1195년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 벗웰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Moravia of Petty(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Olifard(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1215년 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 벗웰에서 Elizabeth MacDuff(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1253년 3월 스컷랜드에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Moray of Bothwell, Canon of Moray nasceu em 1195, em Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Scotland, seu pai, William de Moravia of Petty, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Olifard, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth MacDuff em 1215, em Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em março de 1253, em Scotland, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Moray of Bothwell, Canon of Moray родился в 1195 г. в местности ботвелл, ланаркшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени William de Moravia of Petty было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes Olifard, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth MacDuff в 1215 г. в местности ботвелл, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер марта 1253 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Moray of Bothwell, Canon of Moray nació en 1195, en Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Scotland, su papá, William de Moravia of Petty, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Agnes Olifard, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Elizabeth MacDuff en 1215, en Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en marzo de 1253, en Scotland, a la edad de 58 años.
